runners.formComment: Could only manage fourth last time but placed two on end prior to that, the latest at double-figure odds when third (30.98) over 530m at this track. Has the inside draw but will need the breaks to go his way.

runners.formComment: Was sent out long odds last time but charged out of the boxes with a fast early sectional and gave a sight before being swallowed up late, finishing a 3.5 lengths fourth (30.94) over 530m at this track. Thereabouts at the last couple. Suited here and likely to run well.

runners.formComment: Last start finished 4th over 530m at this track beaten 5.5 lengths (31.39) behind Meaningful in a Grade 6 on April 9. Rates highly and looks tough to beat.

runners.formComment: Latest effort finished 5th on April 9 over 530m at this track behind Meaningful beaten 8 lengths (31.58) in a Grade 6. Was strongly supported last time but ran well below expectations. Worth another chance.
